title: Frontend Web Development Mastery
description: A comprehensive guide to becoming a proficient frontend developer, from HTML/CSS basics to advanced React and performance optimization.
advice: Build projects. Don't just watch tutorials. The best way to learn frontend development is by actively coding and solving problems you encounter.

subGoals.title: Master HTML, CSS, & Responsive Design
subGoals.description: Semantic markup, Flexbox, Grid, and mobile-first responsive design.

subGoals.title: Master JavaScript Fundamentals & DOM Manipulation
subGoals.description: ES6+, async/await, fetch, and direct DOM APIs.

subGoals.title: Master React & State Management
subGoals.description: Components, hooks, routing, and a state library of your choice.

subGoals.title: Performance Optimization & Advanced Concepts
subGoals.description: Bundle analysis, Core Web Vitals, accessibility, testing.

tasks.title: Build a responsive landing page
tasks.description: Ship a real, deployed landing page that looks great on mobile.

subtasks.title: Make it responsive with media queries

tasks.title: Build a JavaScript To-Do App
tasks.description: Vanilla JS only — no frameworks. Persist to localStorage.

tasks.title: Build a React Application
tasks.description: A multi-route app with global state, forms, and an API.
tasks.notes: Pick a project you'd actually use — motivation matters.

tasks.title: Weekly Code Review and Refactoring
tasks.description: Re-read code from 7 days ago and improve naming, structure, tests.
